form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 34-day let-up. The race before that settled back and ran on when 4th of 7 at Gulfstream Park Turf in LR on January 31 over 1710m, 2.5 len behind Thousandsticks carrying 53.5kg at $21.70. Nice effort last time so worth following up.
